Module 8 - Straight Line Competitive Intelligence
One of the key SLP fundamentals of controlling a sale is the gathering of intelligence. It’s the
single most important factor in keeping a prospect on the straight line.
This module explores the methods used to gather as much intelligence as possible on our
prospect, competitors, and market. We need to know exactly what our key competitors are doing
so that we can beat them to the punch every time!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
